title: Record: 10L + 7-gram eval cache (mean val_bpb=1.0717)
body:
## Results

| Seed | val_bpb |
|------|---------|
| 42   | 1.0531  |
| 1337 | 1.0814  |
| 2024 | 1.0805  |
| **Mean** | **1.0717** |
| Std  | 0.0160  |

- Artifact: 15.75 MB
- Train: 600s on 8xH100 SXM
- Eval: ~195s (well under 600s)

## Method

10-layer transformer with backward-looking 7-gram eval cache.

Base model: 512d, 8/4 GQA, 3x MLP LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, BigramHash 10240, SmearGate, value residual, gated attention, U-Net skip, tied embeddings. Mixed int5/int6 quantization + zstd-22, 5% pruning, EMA 0.995.

7-gram cache: fixed alpha=0.40, 4M XOR-hash buckets, min_count=2. Score-first (cache updated after scoring). Deterministic, no TTT, no gradient updates.

- [x] 8xH100 SXM, train ≤600s
- [x] Eval ≤600s
- [x] Artifact ≤16MB
- [x] 3-seed validation
